pdfKnowledgeImportForm.file_path: /data/project/ai-study/题目/三年级上册英语全册知识考点汇总人教版.pdf
pdfKnowledgeImportForm.subject: english

children.title: 科目 / 年级 / 单元 / 小节

confirm.title: ${'确认删除已选 ' + (Array.isArray(subjectSelection) ? subjectSelection.length : 0) + ' 个科目？'}
confirm.description: 删除后关联单元和目录结构列表会重新刷新，请确认已检查选中项。

confirm.title: ${'确认删除已选 ' + (Array.isArray(gradeSelection) ? gradeSelection.length : 0) + ' 个年级？'}
confirm.description: 删除后关联单元和目录结构列表会重新刷新，请确认已检查选中项。

value.unitForm: ${(()=>{const selected=selectedUnitNode||{};const form=unitSearchForm||{};const subjects=Array.isArray(subjectList)?subjectList:[];const grades=Array.isArray(gradeList)?gradeList:[];const options=Array.isArray(unitNumberOptions)?unitNumberOptions:[];const subject=selected.subject||form.subject||((subjects[0]||{}).subject_code)||'english';const grade=selected.grade||form.grade||((grades.find(item=>item.grade_code==='grade_7')||grades[0]||{}).grade_code)||'grade_7';const gradeRow=grades.find(item=>item.grade_code===grade)||{};const unitNoOf=row=>{row=row||{};const name=String(row.unit_name||'').trim();const english=name.match(/^Unit\s*(\d+)\b/i);if(english)return Number(english[1])||0;const cn=options.find(item=>name.startsWith(String(item.cn_label||'')));if(cn)return Number(cn.value)||0;const code=String(row.unit_code||'');const codeMatch=code.match(/unit[_-]?(\d+)/i);return codeMatch?(Number(codeMatch[1])||0):0;};const used=(Array.isArray(unitList)?unitList:[]).filter(item=>item&&item.subject===subject&&item.grade===grade).map(unitNoOf).filter(Boolean);const unitNo=String(Math.min(20,Math.max(0,...used)+1)||1);const unitOption=options.find(item=>String(item.value)===unitNo)||{};const unitLabel=subject==='english'?('Unit '+unitNo):(unitOption.cn_label||('第'+unitNo+'单元'));return {subject,stage:selected.stage||gradeRow.stage||'junior',grade,textbook_version:'pep',unit_no:unitNo,unit_title:'',unit_code:'unit_'+unitNo,unit_name:unitLabel,order_index:Number(unitNo)||1,status:'enabled'};})()}

children.children: ${(()=>{const units=Array.isArray(unitList)?unitList:[];const subjects=new Set(units.map(item=>item&&item.subject).filter(Boolean));const grades=new Set(units.map(item=>item&&item.grade).filter(Boolean));const selected=selectedUnitNode||{};const selectedText=selected.type==='unit'?' / 已选单元：'+(selected.unit_name||selected.unit_code||'未命名单元')+(selected.grade_label?' / '+selected.grade_label:''):selected.type==='grade'?' / 已选年级：'+(selected.grade_label||selected.grade_name||selected.grade||''):selected.type==='subject'?' / 已选科目：'+(selected.subject_name||selected.subject||''):'';return '按科目、年级分组维护单元：科目 '+subjects.size+' 个 / 年级 '+grades.size+' 个 / 单元 '+units.length+' 个'+selectedText;})()}

${(()=>{const sections=Array.isArray(sectionList)?sectionList:[];const units=Array.isArray(allUnitList)?allUnitList:[];const selected=selectedSectionNode||{};const selectedText=selected.type==='section'?' / 已选小节：'+(selected.section_name||selected.section_code||'未命名小节'):selected.type==='unit'?' / 已选单元：'+(selected.unit_name||selected.unit_code||'未命名单元'):selected.type==='grade'?' / 已选年级：'+(selected.grade_label||selected.grade_name||selected.grade||''):selected.type==='subject'?' / 已选科目：'+(selected.subject_name||selected.subject||''):'';return '按科目、年级、单元维护小节：单元 '+units.length+' 个 / 小节 '+sections.length+' 个'+selectedText;})()}

children.treeData: ${(()=>{const form=sectionSearchForm||{};const keyword=String(form.keyword||'').trim().toLowerCase();const subjects=Array.isArray(subjectList)?subjectList:[];const grades=Array.isArray(gradeList)?gradeList:[];const units=(Array.isArray(allUnitList)?allUnitList:[]).filter(item=>item&&(!form.subject||item.subject===form.subject)&&(!form.grade||item.grade===form.grade));const sections=Array.isArray(sectionList)?sectionList:[];const text=row=>[row.subject_name,row.grade_label,row.grade_name,row.grade_semester_name,row.unit_code,row.unit_name,row.section_code,row.section_name].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase();return subjects.filter(subject=>!form.subject||subject.subject_code===form.subject).map(subject=>{const subjectUnits=units.filter(unit=>unit.subject===subject.subject_code);const gradeChildren=grades.filter(grade=>(!form.grade||grade.grade_code===form.grade)&&subjectUnits.some(unit=>unit.grade===grade.grade_code)).map(grade=>{const gradeLabel=grade.grade_label||((grade.grade_name||grade.grade_code||'')+(grade.semester_name?' '+grade.semester_name:''));const unitChildren=subjectUnits.filter(unit=>unit.grade===grade.grade_code).map(unit=>{const unitTitle=unit.unit_name||unit.unit_code||'未命名单元';const sectionChildren=sections.filter(section=>section.unit_id===unit.unit_id).map(section=>Object.assign({},section,{key:'section_'+section.section_id,id:'section_'+section.section_id,type:'section',subject:section.subject||unit.subject,stage:section.stage||unit.stage||grade.stage,grade:section.grade||unit.grade,subject_name:section.subject_name||unit.subject_name||subject.subject_name,grade_label:section.grade_label||unit.grade_label||gradeLabel,unit_id:unit.unit_id,unit_name:unit.unit_name,unit_code:unit.unit_code,title:section.section_name||section.section_code||'未命名小节',name:section.section_name||section.section_code||'未命名小节',icon:'ProfileOutlined',children:[]})).filter(section=>!keyword||text(section).includes(keyword));return Object.assign({},unit,{key:'unit_'+unit.unit_id,id:'unit_'+unit.unit_id,type:'unit',subject_name:unit.subject_name||subject.subject_name,grade_label:unit.grade_label||gradeLabel,title:unitTitle,name:unitTitle,icon:'FolderOpenOutlined',children:sectionChildren,__match:!keyword||text(unit).includes(keyword)});}).filter(unit=>unit.children.length>0||unit.__match);return {key:'grade_'+subject.subject_code+'_'+grade.grade_code,id:'grade_'+subject.subject_code+'_'+grade.grade_code,type:'grade',subject:subject.subject_code,subject_name:subject.subject_name,grade:grade.grade_code,stage:grade.stage,grade_name:grade.grade_name,grade_label:gradeLabel,title:gradeLabel||grade.grade_code,name:gradeLabel||grade.grade_code,icon:'ApartmentOutlined',children:unitChildren};}).filter(grade=>grade.children.length>0||!keyword);return {key:'subject_'+subject.subject_code,id:'subject_'+subject.subject_code,type:'subject',subject:subject.subject_code,subject_name:subject.subject_name,title:subject.subject_name||subject.subject_code,name:subject.subject_name||subject.subject_code,icon:'BookOutlined',children:gradeChildren};}).filter(subject=>subject.children.length>0||(!keyword&&!form.grade));})()}

value.pdfKnowledgeImportForm: ${(()=>{const form=knowledgeSearchForm||{};const units=(Array.isArray(allUnitList)?allUnitList:[]).filter(item=>(!form.grade||item.grade===form.grade)&&(!form.subject||item.subject===form.subject));const current=units[0]||{};const gradeCode=current.grade||form.grade||'grade_3';const gradeRow=(Array.isArray(gradeList)?gradeList:[]).find(item=>item.grade_code===gradeCode)||{};return {file_path:(pdfKnowledgeImportForm||{}).file_path||'/data/project/ai-study/题目/三年级上册英语全册知识考点汇总人教版.pdf',subject:current.subject||form.subject||'english',stage:current.stage||gradeRow.stage||'primary',grade:gradeCode};})()}
